question: After the earphones is in my hand, what are the components I should have?
content: The Hydrabuds ANC package should include 1 Hydrabuds ANC, 1 pair each of S, M, and L silicone ear tips, 1 pair each of S, M, and L memory foam ear tips, 1 pair each of S, M, and L Helix Wings, 1 pair of bumpers, 1 charging case, 1 USB-C charging cable, and 1 quick start guide.
ret: "The Hydrabuds ANC package should include 1 Hydrabuds ANC, 1 pair each of S, M, and L silicone ear tips, 1 pair each of S, M, and L memory foam ear tips, 1 pair each of S, M, and L Helix Wings, 1 pair of bumpers, 1 charging case, 1 USB-C charging cable, and 1 quick start guide.",[]
notes: Answered from the In the Box section. No image is needed because the package contents are listed directly in text.
